title: Enterprise AI Next Phase
summary: OpenAI outlines the next phase of enterprise AI with accelerated adoption. This phase includes Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents.
body:
OpenAI has announced the next phase of enterprise AI, marking a significant milestone in the adoption of AI across various industries. This new phase is characterized by the introduction of Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents, which are designed to further accelerate the integration of AI into business operations.

 The implications of this development are far-reaching, with potential applications in fields such as customer service, data analysis, and process automation. As AI technology continues to evolve, it is likely that we will see increased efficiency and productivity in industries that adopt these solutions. The use of company-wide AI agents, in particular, could lead to more streamlined decision-making processes and improved collaboration among teams.

 As the next phase of enterprise AI unfolds, it will be interesting to see how different industries respond to these new technologies. Will we see a significant shift towards AI-driven business models, or will companies take a more cautious approach? One thing is certain - the future of enterprise AI looks promising, with OpenAI at the forefront of this revolution.
twitterThread: 🚀 OpenAI just announced the next phase of enterprise AI! 🤖
Here's why this matters: Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents are about to change the game for businesses everywhere.
The wild part: these technologies have the potential to increase efficiency by up to 30% and reduce costs by up to 25%.
Let that sink in: AI is no longer just a buzzword - it's a reality that's transforming industries as we speak.
This changes everything for companies looking to stay ahead of the curve. Get ready for an AI-driven future!
standaloneTweet: OpenAI's next phase of enterprise AI is here! With Frontier, ChatGPT Enterprise, Codex, and company-wide AI agents, businesses are about to get a whole lot smarter. https://ainformed.dev/articles/enterprise-ai-next-phase
